sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 2 (Hachette), Dossier 1 'J'ai des relations !', Leçon 1 (décrire le caractère; les pronoms relatifs qui/que/à qui; donner une définition). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
